title: such + (a/an +) adj. + N + that + 子句

formulas.formula: such + (a/an) + adj. + N + that + S + V
formulas.zh: 表「如此……的……以致於……」，such 後接名詞片語，强調名詞的特徵導致某個結果

formulas.formula: such + adj. + (複數/不可數) N + that + S + V
formulas.zh: 複數或不可數名詞前直接接 such，無需冠詞

explanation: 此句型用 such 搭配形容詞修飾名詞，強調名詞的性質或特徵，後接 that 引導的結果子句。可數單數名詞前需加 a/an，複數名詞或不可數名詞直接接；此句型與 so...that 可互換，但 so 後接形容詞，such 後接名詞片語，是關鍵區別。常用於表達強烈結果或後果，在學測中頻繁出現。注意：such 前後的邏輯關係應清晰一致。

examples.eng: It was such a difficult problem that no one could solve it.
examples.chi: 這是一個如此困難的問題，以至於沒有人能解決它。

examples.eng: She gave such useful advice that everyone benefited greatly.
examples.chi: 她提供了如此有用的建議，以致於每個人都大受裨益。

examples.eng: They were such talented musicians that they won the international competition.
examples.chi: 他們是如此有才華的音樂家，以至於贏得了國際比賽。

examples.eng: The weather was such terrible conditions that the flight was cancelled.
examples.chi: 天氣狀況如此惡劣，以至於班機被取消了。

extension.tip: 判斷何時用 such vs so：such 後直接接名詞片語（包括形容詞修飾），so 後接形容詞或副詞；記住「such a/an adj. N」的模式，單數可數名詞必須加冠詞；複數或不可數名詞前的 such 後無冠詞，直接接名詞。

examples.test: Such a bright student could not make such a mistake.
examples.result: → 正確。「bright student」是可數單數，前加 a；「mistake」是可數單數，前加 a

examples.test: She had such knowledge that everyone admired her.
examples.result: → 正確。knowledge 是不可數名詞，such 後直接接，無冠詞

examples.test: Such energetic children needed such space to play.
examples.result: → 正確。children（複數）前直接接 such；space（不可數概念）前直接接 such

extension.note: 「such + (a/an) + adj. + N」→ 可數單數加冠詞；「such + adj. + (複數/不可數 N)」→ 無冠詞

parts: composition that the teacher praised it highly.
exercises.sentence: The student wrote such a well-organized composition that the teacher praised it highly.
exercises.translation: 這位學生寫了如此組織完善的作文，以至於老師大力讚揚了它。

parts: that all the plans had to be changed.
exercises.sentence: They faced such unforeseen circumstances that all the plans had to be changed.
exercises.translation: 他們面臨了如此難以預料的情況，以至於所有計畫都必須改變。

parts: that the audience gave a standing ovation.
exercises.sentence: The performance was such an outstanding display that the audience gave a standing ovation.
exercises.translation: 表演是如此出色的展示，以至於觀眾起立鼓掌。

parts: from customers that production could not keep up.
exercises.sentence: The company received such overwhelming demand from customers that production could not keep up.
exercises.translation: 公司收到了如此壓倒性的客戶需求，以至於生產跟不上。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的 such...that 句型補充，說明天氣惡劣導致的結果。
mc_exercises.question_eng: It was _______ bad weather that the outdoor event was cancelled.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。不可數名詞 weather 前用 such，無需加冠詞。B 項 so 後接形容詞不接名詞，違反句型；C 項 such a 用於可數單數名詞，weather 是不可數名詞，故錯誤；D 項 so 不與冠詞搭配，用法錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 補充空格，用 such...that 表達他的想法非常有創意的結果。
mc_exercises.question_eng: Tom had _______ creative idea that it impressed all the judges.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。可數單數名詞 idea 前用 such 加冠詞，由於 creative 以子音音素開頭的輔音音素開始，需用 an。B 項用 a 不符音標規則；C 項 so 不接名詞片語；D 項 so creative that 後應接子句而非名詞，用法錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的 such...that 句型，強調她給了非常有用的建議。
mc_exercises.question_eng: She gave _______ useful advice that everyone in the meeting benefited greatly.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C。不可數名詞 advice 前直接用 such，不加冠詞或重複形容詞。A 項重複了形容詞；B 項不可數名詞前不加冠詞；D 項 so 後接形容詞時，整個構句應為 so...that 而非 such...that 句型，且缺少名詞。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇合適的選項，強調他們買的房子價格極高，導致債務問題。
mc_exercises.question_eng: They bought _______ expensive houses that they fell into serious debt.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。複數名詞 houses 前用 such 加形容詞，無需加冠詞。B 項省略形容詞，不符原意；C 項 so...that 句型時應為「so expensive that houses」，詞序不對；D 項 an 用於單數名詞，但此處是複數形 houses，用法錯誤。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這是一場如此激烈的比賽，以至於所有觀眾都站起來歡呼。
translation_exercises.answer: It was such an intense match that all the audience stood up and cheered.
key_points: such an + 形容詞 + 可數單數名詞
hints: 框架：such + a/an + adj. + N + that + S + V；match 是可數單數，需加 a/an
常見錯誤：不要寫成 so intense a match 或省略 a/an

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 她用了這麼聰明的策略，使得她成功解決了這個難題。
translation_exercises.answer: She employed such a clever strategy that she successfully solved the difficult problem.
key_points: such a + 形容詞 + 可數單數名詞
hints: 注意 strategy 是可數單數，前面必須加 a；employ 或 use 都可表示『使用』
避免錯誤：不要寫成 such clever strategy（漏掉冠詞 a）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他說了這麼傷人的話語，導致他的朋友好幾個星期都不願與他說話。
translation_exercises.answer: He said such hurtful words that his friend refused to talk to him for several weeks.
key_points: such + adj. + 複數名詞（不加冠詞）
refuse to do something（拒絕做某事）
hints: 框架：such + adj. + (複數/不可數) N + that；words 是複數，直接接在形容詞後面，不加 a/an
常見錯誤：不要寫成 such a hurtful word 或 so hurtful words

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這個城市面臨著如此嚴重的空氣污染問題，以至於政府必須採取極端措施來保護公眾健康。
translation_exercises.answer: The city faced such severe air pollution that the government had to take extreme measures to protect public health.
key_points: such + adj. + 不可數名詞（複合名詞 air pollution）
severe air pollution（嚴重的空氣污染）
hints: 框架：such + adj. + (複數/不可數) N + that；air pollution 是不可數名詞，直接接在形容詞後，不加冠詞
注意時態：faced 和 had to 保持過去式的邏輯一致性；避免寫成 so severe pollution
